summary: The diff shows modifications to InteractiveGlobe.tsx, frontend-file-summaries.txt, and project_state.json, but no evidence of implementing the requested time display features (local time and UTC offset time below the UTC offset selector). All three requirements appear to be missing from the implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display the current local time below the UTC offset selector using the same date-time format as shown in the main web layout
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the diff of adding local time display UI elements, time formatting logic, or real-time updates. The InteractiveGlobe.tsx modifications show only existing globe functionality.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display a corresponding UTC offset time directly below the local time that dynamically updates when the user clicks on different UTC offset buttons
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of UTC offset time display implementation, offset-based time calculation logic, or click handlers for UTC offset buttons that update the time display.

missing_requirements.requirement: Position both time displays within the XPath element /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[3]/div[1]/div[1] below the UTC offset selector
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of adding any time display elements or DOM modifications within the specified XPath location. The diff does not show JSX/TSX additions for time display components.
